steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: All three terms share the factor $x^4$, so add the coefficients: $$6+8-3=11$$

steps.title: Identify b
steps.content: The expression equals $11x^4$. Comparing to $bx^4$ gives $b=11$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $11$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $11$.
